sessions.summary: Investigate CDP callID 06a20fda80384644b54c8fb0cba57029 - email events 500 error, and clone CdpIDXService repo
accomplishments: Investigated callID 06a20fda80384644b54c8fb0cba57029 via Kibana - found 11 hits across 4 services (Gator, AudienceService, CdpIDXService, WorkSpaceService)
Identified root cause: System.ArgumentNullException on Hades baseUri=null in CdpIDXService v1.0.3.176 when querying dataflow status
Determined the 500 error occurs on data event status endpoint (GET /dataevents/{id}/status), not an ingestion flow - explains empty Listener step
Cloned CDP/CdpIDXService repo from github.tools.sap on develop branch to C:\SAPDevelop\CdpIDXService
nextSteps: Investigate Hades baseUri null issue in CdpIDXService source code - likely related to CXCDP-30666 S2S migration siteId fix
Check if fix PRs #17-#20 on CdpIDXService address this specific Hades connection issue
Determine if issue affects only st1 or broader tenants

accomplishments: Investigated callID 7d2d44550a96439e86ec0150f77161ba - EMS-to-CDP connection setup failure in us5/st1
Traced full auth flow: Gator -> ApplicationService -> ApplicationAuthService -> CdflInitService -> CDFLDispatcherService (449 log entries)
Identified primary root cause: Universe UI sends flowName='clientCredentials' on WSSE auth PUT calls, rejected by FlowParameterValidator.cs
Identified secondary issue: CouchDB write-read consistency - credentials not readable across 4 retries (15s) after UpdateAuth write
Found second occurrence in eu5/production (callID 48557cadb29946b38d5c6b735a72da9e, tenant cdp-connectors) - same UI bug
Discovered Gator logs store validation errors in errDetails field (not @message) - updated knowledge base
nextSteps: UI team needs to fix Universe frontend - don't send flowName for WSSE connections
CouchDB consistency issue may need separate investigation if connection setup continues to fail after UI fix

sessions.summary: Helped Irena debug failed ingest - traced baseUri null error back to earlier CdpIDXService investigation
accomplishments: Searched entire SAPDevelop workspace for 'Value cannot be null (Parameter baseUri)' error origin
Identified callID 1e219f95fa8d4267a3f0fd0c0e5c4b8a from today's Kibana session as the investigation context
Reconnected this to the morning session: CdpIDXService Hades baseUri=null on dataflow status endpoint
Reviewed today's git activity across cdfldispatcherservice, cdflinitservice, CdpPublisherService, CdpIDXService
nextSteps: Follow up with Irena on the ingest issue - root cause is CdpIDXService Hades baseUri config missing
Morning session next steps still apply: check PRs #17-#20 on CdpIDXService for the fix
